description_long: This is a modern ergonomic swivel chair with a high, contoured backrest that features two oval cutouts near the top, reminiscent of racing-style gaming chairs. The chair is upholstered in a warm brown material with a darker brown vertical stripe running down the center of both the seat and backrest, providing a visually striking contrast. The seat is thickly padded and curves gently upward at the front edge for added comfort. The chair sits atop a black, five-star base equipped with small casters for mobility. The central support column is sturdy and likely adjustable, though no adjustment levers are visible. The chair lacks armrests, giving it a sleek, minimalist profile suitable for office or gaming environments.
description: A brown, high-back swivel chair with a racing-style design, dark central stripe, and no armrests, set on a five-wheeled black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, contoured backrest with two oval cutouts and a central dark brown stripe running down the seat and back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's ergonomic curve, thick seat padding, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted brown backrest with two cutouts and the five-legged black base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chair's profile, seat contour, and the central support column beneath the seat.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical black column made of metal or reinforced plastic, connecting the seat to the five-legged wheeled base; likely telescoping for height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured backrest with a slight inward curve, two oval cutouts near the top, and a central dark brown stripe; upholstered in brown synthetic leather.
